summary: Create a feature design and append it to designs/INDEX.md.

flags.summary: Sizing estimate (default: medium).
Priority (default: medium).
Repo hint recorded in the design frontmatter.
Preferred worker provider hint.
Preferred worker profile hint.
Branch-name suffix hint recorded in the design.
Verification command hint recorded in the design.
Preview without writing files.

summary: Render the fd-new prompt (for an agent) instead of creating the file directly.

flags.summary: Sizing estimate (default: medium).
Priority (default: medium).
Repo hint recorded in the design frontmatter.
Preferred worker provider hint.
Preferred worker profile hint.
Branch-name suffix hint recorded in the design.
Verification command hint recorded in the design.
Preview without writing files.

summary: Archive a feature design once its sub-items and verification are complete.

flags.summary: Archive even if sub-items or the verification checklist are incomplete.
Preview without archiving.

summary: Show a status table of all feature designs plus detail on the active ones.
Render the worker prompt for one sub-item of a feature design.

flags.summary: Override the base branch recorded in the prompt.

summary: Launch a provider-aware worker (claude or codex) for a design sub-item.

flags.summary: Worker CLI to launch (default: the design's provider hint, else claude).
Model profile (default: the design's profile hint, else fast).
Explicit model override, bypassing provider/profile config lookup.
Base branch override passed into the work prompt.
Print the resolved command without launching the worker.
